response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang background, plus some IDE-adjacent experience writing C/C++ components for NI LabWindows/CVI. However, the role requires deep JVM expertise with Java, Kotlin, and the Spring ecosystem, none of which are evident. Java appears only briefly (robotic arms, device orchestration ~2016-2018), Kotlin is absent, and there is no Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or modern JVM tooling experience. The mismatch with the core technical requirements is substantial.
strengths: Broad senior-level engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Prior IDE component work at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI in C/C++)
Strong software craftsmanship habits (TDD, CI/CD, testing, workshops)
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience
Minimal and dated Java exposure; no Kotlin experience listed
No evidence of deep JVM internals or modern language-tooling work

key_factors.factor: No Kotlin and only marginal Java background
